name: Load Balancer Targets in Public Subnet
description: Load balancer target group contains instances or IPs in public subnets, potentially exposing backend services
conditions: targets ANY (subnet.map_public_ip_on_launch == true OR subnet.is_public == true)
remediation: Move targets to private subnets. Use load balancer in public subnet with targets in private subnets. Ensure security groups restrict direct access to targets.
